summary: Tested PC (Pedido de Cotação) management system for Service Sheets. Backend: 8/8 tests passed - PC creation, sub-PC creation, material aggregation, and grouping endpoints all working. Frontend: Global PC tab shows PCs with sub-PC count badges, FS detail view shows PCs with sub-PCs indented. MaterialModal has PC choice UI (new/existing) with proper data-testid attributes.
seed_data_creation: Created and cleaned up TEST_PC_* materials during testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: PC management system is fully implemented. Key IDs: FS #363 (ID: b5f7c19a-5b3d-43b2-9783-af090df28f8f) has PCs: PC_001#363 (parent) and PC_001.2 (sub-PC). The MaterialModal component accepts existingPCs prop and shows PC choice UI when fornecido_por='Cotação'. Backend endpoints: POST /api/relatorios-tecnicos/{id}/materiais creates/aggregates PCs, GET /api/relatorios-tecnicos/{id}/pedidos-cotacao and GET /api/pedidos-cotacao return grouped PCs with sub_pcs arrays.

tests: POST material with fornecido_por='Cotação' creates PC_XXX#YYY when no PCs exist
POST material with fornecido_por='Cotação' creates sub-PC (PC_001.2) when PCs exist
POST material with pc_id aggregates to existing PC
GET /api/relatorios-tecnicos/{id}/pedidos-cotacao returns grouped PCs with sub_pcs array
GET /api/pedidos-cotacao returns all system PCs with grouping

verified: Pedidos de Cotação section shows '(1 + 1 sub)' count
PC_001#363 displayed as parent with status and materials count
Tab 'Pedidos de Cotação' accessible in navigation
PC_001#363 shows badge '+1 sub' indicating sub-PCs
Sub-PC PC_001.2 displayed below parent with proper styling
PDF and Email buttons available for each PC

features: data-testid='pc-choice-existing' - Radio for 'Agregar a PC existente'
data-testid='pc-select-existing' - Dropdown to select existing PC
Auto-creation message when no PCs exist
